brand-story-bg.query: Quiet Luxury, Worn Daily Velmora was founded on a simple belief: fine jewelry should feel personal, not precious. Each piece is designed in-house and finished in 18k gold plating, balancing refined craftsmanship with an accessible price point so you can build a collection that moves with you — from morning coffee to evening plans. jewelry maker hands gold
